emails.subject: US Natural Gas Prices
emails.body: US Natural Gas Prices Clay, I see that the NYMEX is off another 16-cents today. Do you have a feel for what Henry Hub price causes LNG to stop moving to Lake Charles? Paul

emails.subject: Re: US Natural Gas Prices
emails.body: Re: US Natural Gas Prices Paul, When the Hub goes below $3.50 it becomes difficult. At <$3.00 probably no takers. Clay Paul Y'Barbo@ENRON 04/30/2001 11:10 PM
